wdt_init.message0: Initialization task watchdog timeout %1 seconds %2 Restart when exception is triggered
wdt_init.tooltip: Configure and start the task watchdog. A timeout is triggered if it is not reset within the specified number of seconds.

wdt_add_task.message0: Add current task to watchdog monitoring
wdt_add_task.tooltip: Add the current FreeRTOS task to task-watchdog monitoring.

wdt_reset.message0: Reset the watchdog timer (feed the dog)
wdt_reset.tooltip: Reset the watchdog timer for the current task to prevent a timeout.

wdt_add_user.tooltip: Create a named watchdog user and add it to monitoring.

wdt_reset_user.tooltip: Reset the timer for the specified watchdog user.

wdt_delete_task.message0: Remove current task from watchdog monitoring
wdt_delete_task.tooltip: Remove the current task from task-watchdog monitoring.

wdt_delete_user.tooltip: Remove the specified user from watchdog monitoring.

wdt_deinit.tooltip: Stop and release the task watchdog.
